title: Updating the THEN part of an automation, changing order of steps
excerpt:
When you have an existing automation, it’s impossible to add a step between to others. 
Only solution is to start from scratch which is not optimal at all

posts.author: EyalBenisty (Eyal Benisty)
posts.cookedHtml:
When you have an existing automation, it’s impossible to add a step between to others.
Only solution is to start from scratch which is not optimal at all

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I agree… The feature had had some updates, but it still a little difficult to have total control over the recipes… I think if it had a “modular” layout, we could sort the recipes anyway we wanted, delete it as we pleased, without having to scrap the whole thing to make a single change.
